summary: Bash: Check voice entries near character IDs
input_snippet:
{"command": "python3 -c "
import re

# Check if voice entries near character IDs belong to that character
with open('projects/wiki/data/extracted/lua_tables/AwakerConfig.lua') as f:
    text = f.read()
char_ids = {}
for m in re.finditer(r'\[(\d+)\]\s*=\s*\{[^}]*Name\s*=\s*\"([^\"]+)\"', text, re.DOTALL):
    char_ids[int(m.group(1))] = m.group(2)

summary: Bash: Show full entry content including numeric fields
input_snippet:
{"command": "python3 -c "
import re
with open('projects/wiki/data/extracted/lua_tables/AwakerConfig.lua') as f:
    text = f.read()

# Look for numeric fields (not just string fields)
# Pattern: Key = number (not in quotes)
blocks = re.finditer(r'\[(\d+)\]\s*=\s*\{(.*?)\n    \}', text, re.DOTALL)
for m in list(blocks)[:3]:
    eid = m.group(1)
    content = m.group(2)
    print(f'=== Entry [{eid}] full content ===')
    print(content)
    print()
